MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanction, And For Order Freezing Trust Assets; Supporting Declarations Of Jack Siedman And Eric Robles; And Memorandum
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Jun-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Siedman for Petitioner. Craig Hansen for Iraya Robles.

Mr. Hansen stated that their is a conservatorship for Donatella (case number 292746), that the property was converted to a condo and the Trust owns it outright, that mediation was held but there was not enough information at the time, and that he now has the Quick Book data and they are in the process of exchanging information. Ms. Siedman asked the Court to set a 2-day trial. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, Appointment of Successor Trustee, Accountings and Compelling Redress for Breach of Trust was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To Jun-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Apr-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Seidman for Eric Robles (Petitioner). Craig Hansen for Iraya Robels (Respondent).

Mr. Hansen indicated that they are on track with discovery. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 26, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 1, 2014. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on April 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Siedman for Eric Robles (Petitioner). Craig Hansen for Araya Robles (Respondent).

Mr. Siedman stated that they are involved in discovery, that he needs to do some follow up and take depositions. Mr. Hansen stated that the Trust is small in assets and illiquid. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to February 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Dec-02-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Siedman for Eric Robles (Petitioner). Craig Hansen for Iraya Robles (Respondent).

Mr. Siedman stated that he propounded discovery and that it was mailed out over a week ago. Mr. Hansen stated that he was not aware of it. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to December 2, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For: 1)Removal Of Trustee;2)Appointment Of Successor Trustee;3)Accountings And 4)Compelli
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Continued To Oct-21-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Siedamn for and with Eric Robles (Petitioner). Craig Hansen for Iraya Robles (Respondent).

Mr. Siedman stated that four accountings were sent electronically for 2009, 2010, 2011 and 2012, and that he would like the opportunity to engage in discovery. Mr. Hansen stated that the accountings that were provided have not been filed. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. was continued to October 21, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)
